Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) The name for the GovernanceInstance.
  • license_type - (Required) (Updatable) The license type for the GovernanceInstance.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) Optional description.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • tenancy_namespace - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • idcs_access_token - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • system_tags - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
